certificates: South Africa:16::(D, H, L, P, S, V)
plot outline: In acclaimed director Edgar Wright's psychological thriller, aspiring fashion designer Eloise is mysteriously able to enter the 1960s, where she encounters a dazzling wannabe singer, Sandie. But the glamour is not all it appears to be and the dreams of the past start to crack and splinter into something far darker.
title: Last Night in Soho
akas: ラストナイト・イン・ソーホー (Japan, Japanese title)
